zh.Isleworth, Middlesex, England: 英國米德萊可易斯列沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Gifford於1252年之後出生在英國米德萊可易斯列沃斯時，她的父親Sir Hugh Giffard8780歲，母親Joan de Halsbury8768歲。她於1289年之前與Adam Haliburton在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1337年9月3日在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾。

zh-hans.Isleworth, Middlesex, England: 英国米德萊可易斯列沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Gifford于1252年之后出生在英国米德萊可易斯列沃斯时，她的父亲Sir Hugh Giffard8780岁，母亲Joan de Halsbury8768岁。她于1289年之前与Adam Haliburton在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1337年9月3日在苏格兰貝維其可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Gifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Gifford was born after 1252, in Isleworth, Middlesex, England, her father, Sir Hugh Giffard, was 8780 and her mother, Joan de Halsbury, was 8768. She married Adam Haliburton before 1289, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 3 September 1337, in Berwickshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Gifford est née après 1252, à Isleworth, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh Giffard, avait 8780 ans et sa mère, Joan de Halsbury, avait 8768 ans. Elle a épousé Adam Haliburton avant 1289, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 3 septembre 1337, à Berwickshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Gifford nach 1252 in Isleworth, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hugh Giffard 8780 und ihre Mutter Joan de Halsbury 8768. Sie hat vor 1289 in England Adam Haliburton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 3. September 1337 in Berwickshire, Scotland.

Lei sposato Adam Haliburton prima del 1289, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 3 settembre 1337, nel Berwickshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Giffordが1252年以後にイギリスミッドレセックスイスルオルスで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Giffardは8780歳，母Joan de Halsburyは8768歳であった。1289年以前にイギリスでAdam Haliburtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1337年9月3日にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Gifford(이)가 1252년 이후 영국 미들레세스 이슬루르스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh Giffard(은)는 8780세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Halsbury(은)는 8768세였다. 그녀는 1289년 이전 영국에서 Adam Haliburton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1337년 9월 3일 스컷랜드 버윅실르에서 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Adam Haliburton antes 1289, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 3 de setembro de 1337, em Berwickshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Gifford родилась после 1252 г. в местности исльворт, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh Giffard было 8780 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Halsbury, 8768. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adam Haliburton перед 1289 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 3 сентября 1337 г. в местности бирвиккшир, Шотландия.
